labs.frequency: Prior to initiation and ongoing monitoring
labs.clinicalContext: Exenatide requires dose adjustment based on kidney function. Use with CrCl >30 ml/min, not recommended with CrCl <30 ml/min

labs.frequency: Prior to initiation and ongoing monitoring
labs.clinicalContext: Exenatide extended-release requires eGFR monitoring. Use with eGFR >45 ml/min per 1.73 m², limited data for eGFR 15-45

labRequirements.specialPopulationNotes: In CKD patients: Regular formulation requires CrCl >30 ml/min. Extended-release formulation requires eGFR >45 ml/min per 1.73 m² with limited data for eGFR 15-45 ml/min per 1.73 m². Not recommended for severe CKD.
labRequirements.sourceSnippet: Exenatide: 10 μg twice daily, increased to 20 μg twice daily; CKD adjustment: Use with CrCl >30 ml/min, not recommended with CrCl <30 ml/min. Exenatide extended-release: 2 mg once weekly; CKD adjustment: Use with eGFR >45 ml/min per 1.73 m², limited data for eGFR 15-45.
